title: Pass the Props
description:
The `Greeting` component renders a `UserCard` and passes it `name` and `role` props — but the card ignores them and hardcodes "Guest" / "visitor" instead.

Make `UserCard` actually display the props it receives. A function component reads its props from its first argument: `props.name`, `props.role`.
hints: Every function component receives one argument — the props object passed by its parent.
The parent already passes `<UserCard name="Ada Lovelace" role="Admin" />`. Read those with `props.name` and `props.role`.
